title: SPGR Artifact Envelope v1
description: Shared header every SPGR artifact carries. Per-type schemas compose this with allOf and override the content object with their own field schema.

artifact_id.description: Unique identifier for this artifact instance.

artifact_type.description: Registry key. Selects the per-type schema, file schemas/{artifact_type}-{schema_version}.json.

schema_version.description: Major schema version token used for registry lookup, for example v1.

producing_agent.description: Slug of the agent that produced this artifact, for example spgr-agent-architect.

timestamp.description: Creation or last-write time in ISO 8601.

parent_artifact_ref.description: artifact_id of the upstream artifact this one derives from, or null for a root artifact.

version.description: Artifact instance version, for example v0.1-draft, v1.0. Distinct from schema_version.

version_type.description: Lifecycle state. version-artifact stamps approved on human approval.

checksum.description: Content checksum stamped by version-artifact when version_type becomes approved, for tamper detection.

confidence_map.description: Per-section confidence signal. Keys are content section names.

decision_log.description: Append-only audit trail. log-decision appends entries.

content.description: Artifact body. Generic here, overridden by each per-type schema.
